name: spaghetti-architect-bench-dev
description: Public 'dev' split of the Spaghetti Architect benchmark: 100 by-construction-labelled code instances (50 base + 50 variant) across seven families. Each instance is a program rendered from a clean JSON intermediate representation (IR) of four operation primitives (KEY_VALUE_LOOKUP, MEMBERSHIP_CHECK, AGGREGATE, CONDITIONAL_SELECT), located on four axes: incidental complexity (a strictly-nested 6-level messiness knob at identical semantics: clean < minimal < light < standard < heavy < max), intrinsic complexity (per-family scale knobs N/L/W/T and operation count), language (python, javascript, go, java, cpp), and input variant (v0..v4). Labels (oracle output, the known-optimal clean baseline, knob coordinates, the enabled SPAGH_* anti-pattern set) are correct by construction, computed deterministically from the IR with seed 20260619. A separate held-out 'test' split is private and not included here. Dataset version 2.0.
citeAs: TODO: cite via CITATION.cff; replace with the Zenodo DOI once minted.

distribution.name: github-repository
distribution.description: The Spaghetti Architect source repository hosting the dataset. TODO: replace with the Zenodo archival DOI distribution once minted.
distribution.sha256: TODO: pin the archived release checksum (Zenodo) before camera-ready.

distribution.name: dev-instances
distribution.description: One JSON record per public dev instance (IR + rendered sources for all five languages at every profile + by-construction ground truth), under bench/data/dev/.

distribution.name: manifest
distribution.description: Dataset manifest: axes, knob ranks, families, splits, canary GUID, and per-item dev ground-truth index.

recordSet.name: instances
recordSet.description: The 100 public dev instances and their by-construction labels and axis coordinates. One record corresponds to one bench/data/dev/<stem>.json file.

field.name: stem
field.description: Unique instance id / file stem, e.g. 'allowlist_L32' or 'config_resolver_N8_v3'.

field.name: family
field.description: Task family: one of config_resolver, allowlist, status_router, discovery_pipeline, fsm_transition, agg_stats, threshold_select.

field.name: variant
field.description: Input variant label: 'base' or one of v0..v4 (input perturbations for differential grading).

field.name: intrinsic_knob
field.description: Intrinsic scale knob name for the family (N/L/W/T), or null for the fixed-shape composed families.

field.name: intrinsic_scale
field.description: Intrinsic scale value for the knob (e.g. N=8, L=32), or null when the family has no scale knob.

field.name: n_operations
field.description: Number of IR operations (an intrinsic-complexity coordinate).

field.name: ir
field.description: The clean JSON intermediate representation (module_name, inputs, and the operations chain over KEY_VALUE_LOOKUP / MEMBERSHIP_CHECK / AGGREGATE / CONDITIONAL_SELECT) from which all language renderings are produced.

field.name: oracle_output
field.description: By-construction ground-truth output computed from the IR by the reference oracle (label for the comprehension task and the equivalence gate).

field.name: clean_baseline_runnable
field.description: The known-optimal clean (zero-spaghetti) reference rendering — the target/ceiling for the refactoring task.

field.name: enabled_spagh
field.description: Per-profile set of enabled SPAGH_* anti-pattern ids. The strictly-nested inclusion chain across profiles (clean < minimal < light < standard < heavy < max) is the by-construction incidental-complexity / maintainability label.

field.name: rendered_sources
field.description: Rendered program sources keyed by incidental profile (minimal/light/standard/heavy/max) and then by language (python/javascript/go/java/cpp). Each is semantically equivalent to the clean baseline.
